series.curator_notes: Two parallel release families: (1) 1990 numbered series (Folge 1-3) with unabridged Hörspiele, and (2) 2022-2023 "Als Michel..." individual story releases. Kept both as they represent different listening experiences. Wintergeschichten (2023) is a seasonal special. Two "Hörspielklassiker" versions from 1990/1970 are shorter abridged versions—excluded in favor of the full versions. 1963 "Immer dieser Michel" is a vintage radio play (Retro-Archiv). Crossover compilation with Pippi Langstrumpf excluded.

review.notes: Auto-approved: no gaps or duplicates found.
